<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.3"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="2ymojq-gNBfxFKtIBsma"> <mxGraphModel dx="2716" dy="1040" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="iUfqUIP4DmA_CYB_9dTM-1" value="Client Request" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-230" y="260" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iUfqUIP4DmA_CYB_9dTM-2" value="API Gateway / Proxy" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-60" y="260" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iUfqUIP4DmA_CYB_9dTM-3" value="Behavioral Rate Limiter" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="260" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iUfqUIP4DmA_CYB_9dTM-4" value="Feature Extraction
(Inter-arrival Time, Path Entropy)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="180" width="220" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iUfqUIP4DmA_CYB_9dTM-5" value="ML Model
(KNN / Isolation Forest)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="320" width="220" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iUfqUIP4DmA_CYB_9dTM-6" value="Decision Engine" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="260" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"
